[Home](./index.md) &gt; [pi-ws](./pi-ws.md)

## pi-ws package

Library-first entrypoint for pi-ws.

Use `new PiWs()` to embed the server programmatically, or use the `pi-ws` binary for the default as-is server.

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class

</th><th>

Description

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[PiWs](./pi-ws.piws.md)

</td><td>

Library-first wrapper around `uWebSockets.js` that exposes a built-in Pi RPC route and lets callers add their own HTTP and WebSocket handlers.

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[StaticTokenAuthorizer](./pi-ws.statictokenauthorizer.md)

</td><td>

Simple shared-secret token authorizer.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

</td><td>

Returns the stored upgrade context for a protected WebSocket connection.

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

</td><td>

Returns the stored session for a protected WebSocket connection.

</td></tr>

</td><td>

Loads `PiWs` configuration from c12 config sources plus `PI_WS_*` environment overrides.

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[protectHttpHandler({ handler, authorize, }, input)](./pi-ws.protecthttphandler.md)

</td><td>

Wraps an HTTP handler with synchronous request authorization.

</td></tr>

</td><td>
